raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to make the paper passage stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution framing.","R1.2":"Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the motivation, method, design choice, and claimed benefits form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The passage makes empirical claims, so strengthening it centrally involves ensuring the stated claims are supported by the reported results.","R1.5":"The excerpt contains motivation, results, method, and design rationale in an order that may need section-level or paragraph-level reorganization for force.","R1.6":"The broad request naturally includes improving clarity, concision, register, and sentence-level persuasiveness.","RX.1":"Any projection of a vague strengthening request must preserve uncertainty about what kinds of improvement are intended.","RX.2":"The task must avoid projecting responsibilities that would encourage amplifying claims beyond what the artifact supports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested strengthening itself.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid downstream harm from inflated scientific claims or misleading research presentation.","RX.5":"The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to make the paper passage stronger, which centrally includes sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution framing.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the motivation, method, design choice, and claimed benefits form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The passage makes empirical claims, so strengthening it centrally involves ensuring the stated claims are supported by the reported results.
rationale.R1.5: The excerpt contains motivation, results, method, and design rationale in an order that may need section-level or paragraph-level reorganization for force.
rationale.R1.6: The broad request naturally includes improving clarity, concision, register, and sentence-level persuasiveness.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a vague strengthening request must preserve uncertainty about what kinds of improvement are intended.
rationale.RX.2: The task must avoid projecting responsibilities that would encourage amplifying claims beyond what the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested strengthening itself.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid downstream harm from inflated scientific claims or misleading research presentation.
rationale.RX.5: The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact.
